name: Create or Destroy Water
description: You either create or destroy water. Create Water: You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within range in an open container. Destroy Water: You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within range.
effect: Creates or destroys up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within range. Useful for filling waterskins, dousing fires, or removing standing water.
notes: Water created is clean and potable
Cannot create water inside a sealed container
